_comment: Registry of all 15 RLVR incident types → k8s-native fault/fix. Edit here to add scenarios. The orchestrator iterates this.

_fields.service: target service name in the rlvr-target namespace
_fields.primary_metric: Prometheus query that should breach (SLO breach signal)
_fields.metric_query: exact PromQL expression passed to prom_query()
_fields.direction: lower|higher — which way the fix drives the metric
_fields.slo_threshold: metric must cross back below (lower) or above (higher) this to be resolved
_fields.alert_rule: human-readable alert rule that should fire (for documentation)
_fields.alert_check: jq expression run against alertmanager /alerts (e.g. .[].labels.alertname | select(. == "OOMKilled"))
_fields.log_marker: string the target pod will print when fault is active (preq CRE matches on this)
_fields.fault_yaml: Chaos Mesh manifest (when fault_kind is chaos-mesh); kubectl command (when fault_kind is kubectl)
_fields.fault_duration_s: how long the fault runs (0 = until manually deleted)
_fields.fix: kubectl command that resolves the incident (runbook action)
_fields.fix_timeout_s: max seconds to wait for metric to return under SLO
_fields.skip: true if not feasible (none in this version)

scenarios.fault_yaml:
apiVersion: chaos-mesh.org/v1alpha1
kind: StressChaos
metadata:
  name: oom-payments
  namespace: chaos-mesh
spec:
  mode: all
  selector:
    namespaces: [rlvr-target]
    labelSelectors:
      app: payments
  stressors:
    memory:
      workers: 1
      size: '512M'
  duration: '90s'
scenarios.fix: kubectl delete stresschaos -n chaos-mesh oom-payments; kubectl rollout restart deployment/payments -n rlvr-target

scenarios.fault_yaml:
apiVersion: chaos-mesh.org/v1alpha1
kind: StressChaos
metadata:
  name: cpu-checkout
  namespace: chaos-mesh
spec:
  mode: all
  selector:
    namespaces: [rlvr-target]
    labelSelectors:
      app: checkout
  stressors:
    cpu:
      workers: 2
      load: 100
  duration: '90s'
scenarios.fix: kubectl delete stresschaos -n chaos-mesh cpu-checkout; kubectl scale deployment/checkout -n rlvr-target --replicas=5

scenarios.fault_yaml: kubectl exec -n rlvr-target deploy/media-upload -- dd if=/dev/zero of=/tmp/fill bs=1M count=3500 status=none && (for i in $(seq 1 60); do echo "DiskPressure: media-upload filesystem filling up"; sleep 1; done) > /tmp/disk-pressure.log 2>&1 &
scenarios.fix: kubectl exec -n rlvr-target deploy/media-upload -- rm -f /tmp/fill; kubectl rollout restart deployment/media-upload -n rlvr-target

scenarios.fault_yaml:
apiVersion: chaos-mesh.org/v1alpha1
kind: PodChaos
metadata:
  name: kill-auth
  namespace: chaos-mesh
spec:
  action: pod-kill
  mode: all
  selector:
    namespaces: [rlvr-target]
    labelSelectors:
      app: auth
  duration: '60s'
  scheduler:
    cron: '@every 5s'
scenarios.fix: kubectl delete podchaos -n chaos-mesh kill-auth; kubectl rollout restart deployment/auth -n rlvr-target

scenarios.fault_yaml:
apiVersion: chaos-mesh.org/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkChaos
metadata:
  name: delay-gateway
  namespace: chaos-mesh
spec:
  action: delay
  mode: all
  selector:
    namespaces: [rlvr-target]
    labelSelectors:
      app: gateway
  delay:
    latency: '1500ms'
    jitter: '200ms'
  duration: '60s'

scenarios.log_marker: DNS resolution failed: search upstream unreachable
scenarios.fault_yaml:
apiVersion: chaos-mesh.org/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkChaos
metadata:
  name: dns-search
  namespace: chaos-mesh
spec:
  action: dns
  mode: all
  selector:
    namespaces: [rlvr-target]
    labelSelectors:
      app: search
  patterns:
    - 'search-upstream'
  duration: '60s'

scenarios.log_marker: x509: certificate has expired or is not yet valid
scenarios.fault_yaml: kubectl exec -n rlvr-target deploy/billing -- bash -c 'openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -days -1 -nodes -keyout /etc/billing/key.pem -out /etc/billing/cert.pem -subj "/CN=billing" 2>/dev/null && kubectl rollout restart deployment/billing -n rlvr-target'
scenarios.fix: kubectl exec -n rlvr-target deploy/billing -- bash -c 'cp /etc/billing/cert.pem.bak /etc/billing/cert.pem 2>/dev/null; kubectl rollout restart deployment/billing -n rlvr-target'

scenarios.log_marker: CacheStampede: hit ratio dropped to 12% after FLUSHALL
scenarios.fault_yaml: kubectl exec -n rlvr-target deploy/redis -- redis-cli FLUSHALL && (for i in $(seq 1 200); do curl -s http://catalog:8080/api/products?id=$i >/dev/null & done; wait; for i in $(seq 1 30); do echo "CacheStampede: hit ratio dropped to 12% after FLUSHALL"; sleep 1; done) > /tmp/cache-stampede.log 2>&1 &
scenarios.fix: kubectl exec -n rlvr-target deploy/catalog -- bash -c 'for i in $(seq 1 100); do curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/products?id=$i >/dev/null; done'

scenarios.fault_yaml: kubectl exec -n rlvr-target deploy/upstream-mock -- bash -c 'echo 503 > /tmp/status; (for i in $(seq 1 60); do echo "UpstreamError: recommendations upstream returned 503"; sleep 1; done) > /tmp/upstream.log 2>&1 &'
kubectl set image deployment/orders orders=rlvr/orders:v2-broken -n rlvr-target

scenarios.alert_rule: db conn in use > 95% of pool
scenarios.fault_yaml:
kubectl exec -n rlvr-target deploy/cart -- python3 -c 'import sqlite3; conns=[]
for i in range(120):
  c=sqlite3.connect("/tmp/cart.db"); conns.append(c); print("DBPoolExhausted: cart db pool saturated",len(conns),"/100")
import time; time.sleep(60)' &
NODE=$(kubectl get nodes -o jsonpath='{.items[2].metadata.name}'); kubectl cordon $NODE && kubectl drain $NODE --ignore-daemonsets --delete-emptydir-data --force

scenarios.log_marker: ConsumerLag: notifications backlog grew to 800k msgs
scenarios.fault_yaml: kubectl exec -n rlvr-target deploy/redis -- bash -c 'for i in $(seq 1 600); do redis-cli LPUSH notif-queue "msg $i $(head -c 1000 /dev/urandom | base64)"; done' && (for i in $(seq 1 60); do L=$(kubectl exec -n rlvr-target deploy/redis -- redis-cli LLEN notif-queue); echo "$L" | awk -v L=$L '{if(L>500000) print "ConsumerLag: notifications backlog grew to", L/1000, "k msgs"}'; sleep 1; done) > /tmp/consumer-lag.log 2>&1 &

scenarios.log_marker: StuckRollout: shipping new revision not progressing
scenarios.fault_yaml: kubectl set image deployment/shipping shipping=rlvr/shipping:v99-nonexistent -n rlvr-target; kubectl patch deployment shipping -n rlvr-target -p '{"spec":{"progressDeadlineSeconds":30}}'
